name: punchwall-free-aim-combat-polish
description: Validate free-aim punching, half-radius cubic excavation, single-channel impact audio, forceful debris, coin-only wall rewards, clean forest map, hidden block HP HUD, and safe HUD number bounds.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local f=root["Depth Blocks"] local first=f:GetChildren()[1] local buildings,overlays,curatedSkyline=0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then if d:GetAttribute("TextureStyle")=="BuildingFacadeWindows" or d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="DistantSkyline" then buildings+=1 end if d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="CombatPlazaPaver" or d.Name=="City Lane Paint" or string.find(d.Name,"Checkpoint") then overlays+=1 end end end local curated=workspace:FindFirstChild("CuratedVisualAssets") if curated then for _,v in ipairs(curated:GetChildren()) do if string.find(v.Name,"Skyline") or string.find(v.Name,"City Landmark") then curatedSkyline+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({count=#f:GetChildren(),size=tostring(first.Size),fieldCount=root:GetAttribute("DepthBlockCount"),radius=root:GetAttribute("PunchRadius"),mode=root:GetAttribute("PunchTargetMode"),buildings=buildings,curatedSkyline=curatedSkyline,overlays=overlays})

steps.label: cubic field and clean forest environment

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,FistMastery=1,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-40)) local before=hrp.CFrame.LookVector local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") local after=hrp.CFrame.LookVector local debris=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren() local minSpeed=math.huge for _,d in ipairs(debris) do minSpeed=math.min(minSpeed,d:GetAttribute("InitialForwardSpeed") or 0) end return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,hits=r.hitCount,lookDelta=(before-after).Magnitude,power=r.Power,mastery=r.FistMastery,coins=r.Coins,broken=r.BrokenDepthBlocks,fragments=#debris,minSpeed=minSpeed})

steps.label: free aim keeps facing and wall rewards coins only

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local minVelocity,minOffset=math.huge,math.huge for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren()) do minVelocity=math.min(minVelocity,d:GetAttribute("InitialForwardSpeed") or 0) minOffset=math.min(minOffset,d:GetAttribute("SpawnFrontOffset") or 0) end return H:JSONEncode({minForwardVelocity=minVelocity,minFrontOffset=minOffset})

steps.label: debris starts outside the wall and bursts toward open space

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local bridge=gui.PunchWallClientAutomation return H:JSONEncode({third=bridge:Invoke("Punch"),blocked=gui:GetAttribute("PunchActionCooldownBlocked"),motions=gui:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0,interval=gui:GetAttribute("PunchAttackInterval")})

steps.label: animation follows the one-second action cooldown

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local highlights=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("Highlight") then highlights+=1 end end local punchChannels=0 local music for _,d in ipairs(game:GetService("SoundService"):GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("Sound") then if d.Name=="Punch Impact Channel" then punchChannels+=1 end if d.Name=="Hero Forest Music" then music=d end end end local hud=gui.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local power=hud:FindFirstChild("PowerValue",true) local coins=hud:FindFirstChild("CoinsValue",true) local wall=hud:FindFirstChild("WallValue",true) local function maxSize(v) local c=v and v:FindFirstChildOfClass("UITextSizeConstraint") return c and c.MaxTextSize or 0 end local function rightScale(v) return v.Position.X.Scale+v.Size.X.Scale end local hudSafe=rightScale(power)<=0.65 and rightScale(coins)<=0.63 and rightScale(wall)<=0.76 and rightScale(power.Parent.PowerMask)<=0.72 and rightScale(coins.Parent.CoinsMask)<=0.70 and rightScale(wall.Parent.WallMask)<=0.80 return H:JSONEncode({highlights=highlights,targetHUD=gui.TargetWallHUD.Visible,targetEnabled=gui:GetAttribute("TargetBlockHUDEnabled"),freeAim=gui:GetAttribute("FreeAimPunch"),soundMode=gui:GetAttribute("PunchSoundMode"),punchChannels=punchChannels,musicPlaying=music and music.Playing,musicLooped=music and music.Looped,musicId=music and music.SoundId,powerMax=maxSize(power),coinsMax=maxSize(coins),wallMax=maxSize(wall),hudSafe=hudSafe,motionDuration=gui:GetAttribute("PunchAnimationDuration"),motionCount=gui:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0})

steps.label: visual audio motion and HUD contracts
